extension.summary: Main resolvers, useful for converting html/js into playable content from various hosts (Greek ones).
extension.description: Main resolvers, useful for converting html/js into playable content from various hosts (Greek ones).
extension.news:
Version 0.1.2 (April 10th, 2026) - Push bitchute plugin, upstream takes too long
Version 0.1.1 (April 9th, 2026) - Updated AlphaGR plugin
Version 0.1.0 (April 6th, 2026) - Updated the following plugins > AlphaGR > Ant1CY > Ant1GR (which no longer includes the live stream as it's directly passed from the live playlist) > Mega (which no longer includes the live stream as it's directly passed from the live playlist) > Skai > Star
New Plugins: > ARTlive > Dailymotion (which overrides official ResolveURL plugin by passing the parent m3u8 manifest directly to the player) > Euronews > Twitch (which includes API client key to make deployment easier)
Removed the following: > ERT was removed (ERTflix has introduced changes accross the board making it way too hard to implement one)
Version 0.0.18 (May 9th, 2022) - Fix imports due to major change in resolveurl's code base
Version 0.0.17 (December 13, 2021) - Update ert - Update mega
Version 0.0.16 (December 5, 2021) - Update ert
Version 0.0.15 (October 1, 2021) - Update ert
Version 0.0.14 (June 9, 2021) - Remove highstream - Mitigate ert plugin by adding referer to the headers
